concerns.text: Tasks T067 (physical descriptor extraction) and T068 (peptide planarity validation) have no matching FR/SC in spec.md. The spec's FR-002/FR-003 only mandate raw 3D/2D extraction. These tasks implement unapproved scope (Linus Pauling review) not present in the spec.

Tasks T071 (physics-informed loss), T072 (stereoisomer evaluation), and T073 (integration) lack spec coverage. Spec FR-004/FR-005 define a standard SchNet/RF comparison; no requirement exists for physics-informed loss or stereoisomer-specific metrics.

Tasks T076 (experimental validation), T077 (hydration impact), and T078 (experimental results) contradict spec.md Assumptions which explicitly state 'Physical measurement validation is out of scope' and 'hydration effects are out-of-scope'. No FR/SC supports these tasks.

Tasks T079 (validate physical constants) and T080 (validate stereoisomer metrics) reference requirements (T067, T071, T072) that do not exist in the spec. There is no FR/SC mandating validation of specific bond lengths or stereoisomer-specific error improvements.

Tasks T081-T083 require updating research.md with experimental validation and hydration protocols. Since the spec explicitly excludes these topics, there is no FR/SC requiring their documentation in the research plan.

Task T066 (unit test for physical descriptors) is tagged for US1 but has no corresponding implementation task in the spec's scope. While T067 is the implementation, T066 tests a feature (bond length precision) not mandated by FR-002/FR-003.

Tasks T069 (physics-informed loss test) and T070 (stereoisomer test) are tagged for US2 but test features (physics-informed loss, stereoisomer metrics) not defined in spec.md FR-004/FR-005 or SC-001/SC-004.
Tasks T074 (experimental validation test) and T075 (hydration impact test) are tagged for US3 but test capabilities explicitly excluded in spec.md Assumptions. No FR/SC supports these test cases.
